currentProgram.desc: Petra realises that it’s not all black and white when it comes to the game of love. John has Felicity incensed when John derails her plan. Stefan comes across startling information about an enemy.

After escaping the insane asylum in which he was incarcerated, Jerry Blake (Terry O'Quinn) impersonates a marriage counselor and manages to win over a patient (Meg Foster) and her young son (Jonathan Brandis).

Vele di Scampia: a young boy observes a little girl reading locked outside his balcony. The two meet at the carnival party. "Why do you always read on the balcony?" The answer is the song of a crucified mermaid
It is a movie where people looking for kidney to sell outside Africa
During their Christmas break, a group of sorority girls are stalked by a stranger.
Young makes their final stop in their quest for kink and community in Oakland, California.
Kassi reeling from ex with roommate. Sisters vie for man's heart. Brandy reveals secret to Bryan.
A 6-year marriage is on the brink of divorce as Quincy sues husband Jeron for failing to pay bills.
Zakirah is tired of the cheating accusations her boyfriend levies on her. Zakirah unlocks her phone.

Angelo makes a living selling fake paintings, but is unmasked and forced to flee to the United States. Arriving in Los Angeles with no money, he pretends to be the son of a wealthy, recently deceased Italian-American businessman. Will he be able to convince George, the real descendant?

When Kiran Met Karen (WKMK) is a cross-cultured romance set in New York. Chriselle Almeida plays Kiran Lohar, a famous Bollywood actress, who has come to New York to promote her new film ?A Himalayan Love Story?, and spend time with her fianc? Dev Ghosh, a rich and successful musician. At the press conference, Kiran meets a lesbian journalist Karen Sorens. There is an instant connection, attraction. What happens in next few days is the crux of the story. Will Kiran come out of the closet, or will she fear Bollywood ? the industry that gave her the stardom?
Gatoni Maya, a 23-year-old brave girl, is resolved to fulfill her deceased father's dream of making a living through arts.

An army veteran who returns home to the Ozarks finds an abandoned young boy in the woods, and as she searches for clues to the boy's identity, discovers the local folklore about a spirit, which comes in the form of a child.
When their grandma falls ill, Diamond and her closest cousins risk everything to save her and keep their family together.
After trading his grift for a corporate gig, a young recluse finds himself with the perfect life, perfect job, and perfect girl. But when he's on top, he decides to throw it all away.
At JK’s House, Dr. Amber Jenkins (Robin Givens) and JK blend family values and life lessons with music and dance.
Wicked land mogul threatens group of Texas homesteaders in post-Civil War western.
During WWII, the death camp at Treblinka had an escape, causing the Commandant at a similar camp in Sobibor to vow (actually threaten) that his camp would never experience the same thing.
A gifted student beats the odds and earns a scholarship, but her loyalty to her troubled boyfriend could cost her everything.
The 13-part serial begins with pilot Ace Drummond flying to Mongolia to take on the Dragon, a nefarious villain who plans to destroy an international airline.
An estranged woman moves in with her sister after her husband’s mysterious murder, vowing innocence while plotting to take her sister’s family for herself.
A young copper is caught between love and sacrifice, while Prince Nnamdi has to make his own way when his father the king disowns him.
With a new principal in town, Rhyme and the Chicken Girls must band together to save the dance.

After a rocky first encounter, Donald finds himself torn between his feelings for Sandra, his sister's friend, and his commitment to his materialistic fiancée, Ivy. As his wedding plans unfold, he struggles to convince his sister to help with the preparations, all while navigating his growing feelings.
Seow Woo se enfrenta a su padre. Ji Hong y Hye Jung discuten al tratar a una paciente.
Elena debe reclutar para un temido guerrillero si quiere salvar a su hijo secuestrado. Un thriller de tensión, coraje y sacrificio.
La obsesión de venganza contenida durante 20 años desemboca acabando con la familia de un prestigiado político
Tierra de colores y fiestas, paseos con la banda y con sus sones por las calles y por las trajineras.

Una historia española sobre la mayoría de edad que se centra en las travesuras de dos jóvenes de 17 años, que tienen una lujosa casa en la playa casi para ellos solos un verano. Este es un verano de despertares sexuales.
Where do we come from and where are we going? Whoever wants to answer the most important questions must decipher the secret of the universe first. A journey to people and machines.

Dramedy Frontalwatte- feature debut by Jakob Lass and his graduation film from from film school jumpstarted the German Mumblecore movement.
 

 With his brother, actor and director Tom (PAPA GOLD), Jakob Lass has developed a fresh, improvisation-based style, including his own manifesto, FOGMA.

The face-off between Swami Ji and the LGBTQ NGO head with each person engaging in highly tensed arguments while presenting their respective views on the social acceptance of the LGBTQ community. Pratyush posts an emotional message on social media and Renuka seeks out a way to break the shackles of the orthodox societal barriers.

The story revolves around 2 couples Radha & Ekash, Raghav & Sabeena whom are struggling to make their relationship better but fell for each others ex’s Story also showcases the struggle of Chuchu who’s stuck between these couples, and there’s a twist when they all get stuck in a Jungle. This story has love, comedy, drama and Horror scenes in comic way….

With aerial footage from fifty-four countries, 'Home' is a depiction of how Earth's problems are all interlinked.

NASA has transferred responsibility for the launches of astronauts to low-Earth orbit, to the private sector. To ensure what they call dissimilarredundancy the space agency has asked both Spacex and Boeing to develop human-rated launchers and spacecraft. However the development of two new systems has not been without its difficulties.

This episode is dedicated to performance and versatility, highlighting the 50-knot Italian maxi-RIB Mar.co E44 with its luxury cabin. It also covers three premier US fishing boats: the wide-beamed Southport 38 FE (PBIBS 2025), the serious offshore Bertram 39 CC (PBIBS 2025), and the versatile hybrid bay boat Blackfin 262 HB (MIBS 2025).

What if your breakthrough is connected to something you've been overlooking? On Believer's Voice of Victory, Courtney Copeland and Pastors Michael and Sherrie Howell share powerful stories of transformation through faith and giving. Learn how the principles of seedtime and harvest can impact every area of your life. If you're ready to experience an increase and step into a thriving faith-based family, this episode will inspire you to take action.

Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

Journey to the legendary Giza Pyramids, one of the world’s most iconic archaeological and cultural treasures. Located on the outskirts of Cairo, these ancient monuments have fascinated travelers, historians, and explorers for thousands of years.

The Abu al-Abbas al-Mursi Mosque is an Egyptian mosque in the city of Alexandria. It is dedicated to the 13th century Murcian Andalusi Sufi saint Abul Abbas al Mursi, whose tomb it contains. It is located in the Anfoushi neighborhood of Alexandria, near the Citadel of Qaitbay.

Aurélie Gonin is one of the few women working in winter action sports filmmaking. Over the years she gathered expertise in every aspect of her field. We join as she directs an elite ski and snowboarding qualification event of the Freeride World Tour.
Pont Du Gard - France.

In Quanzhou, southeast China, Kleber seeks out masters of the Five Ancestors Fist, a combination of five local kungfu styles. He meets the abbot of a Southern Shaolin Temple, and takes part in the extraordinary training regime used by Shaolin monks to hone their bodies and minds. He experiences the intricacies of Quanzhou’s traditional puppetry, and learns how Five Ancestors Fist incorporated military tactics that allowed its practitioners to band together and fight off pirates.

Origami is the traditional Japanese art of folding paper into decorative shapes and figures without cutting or glue.Create an easy origami paper parrot using basic and smooth folding techniques.

Folk art is the essence of a culture. Painter and maker Mystele Kirkeeng paints abstract folk art faces and figures. Tool expert Joe Rotella uses baker's twine to weave new art on a tin tile. Host Julie Fei-Fan Balzer draws repeating shapes to create a meditative mandala. Jane Dunnewold shares another artistic perspective.

SUVs usually are rather impressive right out of the factory, but there are many tuning and customizing options. In this episode we present Kelleners BMW X5, the Mercedes Brabus B63 and the Porsche Cayenne tuned by Techart.

Shifting Gears is the all-new authoritative guide to the latest trends and technology from within today’s ever-changing automotive industry. From the racetrack to the suburban street, Shifting Gears delivers the most up-to-date news on cutting edge research, development and design. We delve beneath the skin of some of the most advanced machines on the planet – we visit international motor shows for the newest releases and concept vehicles; uncover new advances in technology developed both in the laboratory and on the race track; keep up to date in the race for alternative fuels, improved safety, satellite navigation, in-car entertainment and multi-media connectivity; and look ahead to the designs and trends of the future. From luxury dream machines and fantasy prototypes to the globally marketed mainstays, our access to the world’s leading race teams and automotive manufacturers ensure we have every corner covered. Enjoy the ride, as the future unfolds and we keep on shifting gears!

The China International Supply Chain Expo (CISCE) is the world's first exhibition dedicated to supply chains. It serves as a gateway for China to establish a new development pattern and promote high-level openness. With the theme of "Connecting the World for a Shared Future," the fourth CISCE is scheduled to take place from June 22 to June 26 at the China International Exhibition Center in Beijing.

The thematic event on green agriculture brings together representatives from government, associations and enterprises for in-depth discussions on topics including green technology-driven industrial synergy, global green supply chain development, and brand-led agricultural value enhancement. It aims to inject new momentum into building an efficient, low-carbon, and inclusive agricultural development landscape.
